---
title: "Neel Gupta"
last: Gupta
first: Neel
people_group: member
education: PhD Information Science
subtitle: PhD Student | Information School, University of Washington
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/neelgupta2112
    - icon: person-circle
      text: Personal Website
      href: https://neelgupta2112.github.io/
---

Neel Gupta is a Ph.D student at the University of Washington working with Professor Melanie Walsh on topics in cultural analytics. He researches contemporary culture with both humanistic and computational methods, thinking about how aesthetic production and consumption is shaped by technologies and capitalism. Before starting his Ph.D, he worked as a data scientist in marketing analytics, and studied English Literature, Mathematics, and Computer Science as part of the Honors Program at Swarthmore College.
